memories.title: First Meeting
memories.description: We bumped into each other while reaching for the same book. You smiled and let me have it.
memories.dialogue:
You: You can have it, I've read it a hundred times.
Me: Oh, the Little Prince! It's my favorite too.

memories.title: First Date
memories.description: You were so scared on the roller coaster, but you held my hand the whole time.
memories.dialogue:
You: If I fall, I'm taking you with me!
Me: Deal.

puzzles.question: What book were we both reaching for?
puzzles.hint: It's about a boy from an asteroid.

loveLetter:
Dear Alice,

Since that day at the library, my life has been so much brighter.

I hope you enjoy this little game I made for you.

Love,
Bob
